   "source": [
    "# ロックイン検出: 弱い AM/FM 構造の復元\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/case_lockin_detection.ipynb)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "938ed18c",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.006369,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:00.488026+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:00.481657+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "ロックイン検出は、**速い搬送波の上に乗ったゆっくりした変調** を取り出したいときに使います。見たいのはキャリアそのものではなく、baseband へ落とした後に残る振幅・位相のトレンドです。\n",
    "\n",
    "この公開版 notebook は legacy のヘテロダイン例を整理し、AM/FM 復元の本質に絞っています。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "9a3de89e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T14:36:00.505265Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T14:36:00.504959Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.521520Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.520907Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 8.024514,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.523165+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:00.498651+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from scipy import signal\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy import TimeSeries\n",
    "\n",
    "fs = 1024.0\n",
    "duration = 40.0\n",
    "t = np.arange(0, duration, 1 / fs)\n",
    "np.random.seed(42)\n",
    "\n",
    "# The carrier is the strong narrowband tone that transports the information we actually care about.\n",
    "f_carrier = 100.0\n",
    "\n",
    "# Slow AM and PM terms encode the physical drift to be recovered after demodulation.\n",
    "amp_mod = 1.0 + 0.5 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.2 * t)\n",
    "phase_mod = 2.0 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.05 * t)\n",
    "\n",
    "clean_signal = amp_mod * np.cos(2 * np.pi * f_carrier * t + phase_mod)\n",
    "noise = np.random.normal(0, 0.8, len(t))\n",
    "ts = TimeSeries(clean_signal + noise, sample_rate=fs, name=\"Modulated Signal\", unit=\"V\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "da617d24",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.031642,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.573995+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.542353+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. `lock_in` で振幅と位相を取り出す\n",
    "\n",
    "参照周波数を与えることで、キャリアと同相な成分だけを残し、広帯域雑音を平均で落とします。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "8c6a1930",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.602366Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.601955Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.730698Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.724814Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 2.147324,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.732467+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:08.585143+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x800 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# stride sets the time resolution of the recovered baseband trend: shorter stride follows faster modulation but averages less noise.\n",
    "amp, phase = ts.lock_in(f0=f_carrier, stride=0.1, output=\"amp_phase\", deg=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(12, 8), sharex=True)\n",
    "ax1.plot(amp, label=\"Extracted Amplitude\", color=\"red\")\n",
    "ax1.plot(t, amp_mod, label=\"True Amplitude\", color=\"black\", ls=\"--\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "ax1.set_ylabel(\"Amplitude [V]\")\n",
    "ax1.legend()\n",
    "\n",
    "ax2.plot(phase, label=\"Extracted Phase\", color=\"blue\")\n",
    "ax2.plot(t, phase_mod, label=\"True Phase\", color=\"black\", ls=\"--\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "ax2.set_ylabel(\"Phase [rad]\")\n",
    "ax2.legend()\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Time [s]\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ffd60297",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.021695,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.825646+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.803951+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. 手動復調でも同じ物理が見える\n",
    "\n",
    "参照波との積を取ると DC 成分と `2*f_c` 成分ができます。低域フィルタは後者を落とし、ゆっくりした包絡と位相ドリフトだけを残します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "ed160465",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.877334Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.877026Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.098609Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.090185Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 1.252915,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.099773+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:10.846858+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "ref_cos = np.cos(2 * np.pi * f_carrier * t)\n",
    "ref_sin = np.sin(2 * np.pi * f_carrier * t)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Multiply by the reference to shift the carrier to baseband and create a mirrored image at 2*f_c.\n",
    "mixed_i = (ts * ref_cos) * 2.0\n",
    "mixed_q = (ts * (-ref_sin)) * 2.0\n",
    "\n",
    "# Low-pass after mixing removes the 2*f_c image term so the slow modulation remains.\n",
    "b, a = signal.butter(4, 2.0, fs=fs, btype=\"low\")\n",
    "i_filtered = TimeSeries(signal.filtfilt(b, a, mixed_i.value), sample_rate=fs)\n",
    "q_filtered = TimeSeries(signal.filtfilt(b, a, mixed_q.value), sample_rate=fs)\n",
    "\n",
    "amp_manual = np.sqrt(i_filtered**2 + q_filtered**2)\n",
    "phase_manual = np.arctan2(q_filtered.value, i_filtered.value)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "plt.plot(amp_manual, label=\"Manual Amplitude\")\n",
    "plt.plot(amp, label=\"lock_in()\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d5e8fe4b",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.02668,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.205572+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.178892+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 3. 復調すると情報は低周波へ移る\n",
    "\n",
    "復調後のスペクトルは 0 Hz 近傍に集まるので、高周波キャリア問題が低周波トレンド解析の問題へ変わります。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4bb4938a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.259308Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.258995Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T14:36:15.716022Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T14:36:15.715168Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 3.494034,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:15.722955+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T14:36:12.228921+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "asd_raw = ts.asd(fftlength=4)\n",
    "complex_signal = ts.lock_in(f0=f_carrier, stride=1 / fs, output=\"complex\")\n",
    "asd_demod = complex_signal.asd(fftlength=4)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "plt.loglog(asd_raw.frequencies, asd_raw.value, label=\"Original Signal\")\n",
    "plt.loglog(asd_demod.frequencies, asd_demod.value, label=\"Demodulated Signal\")\n",
    "plt.axvline(f_carrier, color=\"red\", ls=\"--\", label=\"Carrier\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.grid(True, which=\"both\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
